content.question: What are the longitudinal educational and labor-market outcomes (secondary-school access, vocational vs. academic tracking, tertiary education, employment) for cohorts classified as SEN/BTMN in primary school, and do outcomes differ by ethnicity, gender, and baseline socioeconomic status after accounting for underlying academic performance?
content.reduction_path: Link Oktatási Hivatal administrative records (SNI classification, school placements, grade progression) to secondary-school enrollment, vocational training, and labor-force registry data; conduct cohort analysis with propensity-score or instrumental-variable methods to estimate causal effects of SEN classification on mobility outcomes.
